summary: Request to change the existing OSError for missing TLS material to FileNotFoundError.
expected_behavior: Missing TLS certificate material raises FileNotFoundError with a filename attribute, while existing OSError handlers continue to work.
actual_behavior: Missing TLS certificate material raises OSError with a string message containing the invalid path.
missing_info: A complete invocation or setup showing how conn.cert_file is configured.
